Mum! mwmesam Wank mum mun [V “SS—m mVd] AHVNIGIIOVILLXH 3 VIClNI :{O ELLHZVD 3H}. 9 -- 6 of 11 -- [W'T III-AW 4] W EFI {Ema : WWW NATIONAL HIGHWAYS AUTHORITY OF INDIA NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th February, 2013 The National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Second Amendment Regulations, 2013 No.NHAI/11011/17/2012-HR.I(VoI.XI). — In exercise of the powers conferred by section 35, read with section 9, of the National Highways Authority of India Act, 1988 (68 of 1988), the National Highways Authority of India hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Regulations, 1996, namely: - 1. Short title and commencement:- (1) These regulations may be called the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Second Amendment Regulations, 2013. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Schedule to the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Regulations, 1996 (hereinafter referred to as the principal regulations), the Schedules prescribing eligibility criteria and qualifications for the following posts shall be deleted, namely:- “Chief General Manager (Planning and Quality) Chief General Manager (Standardization, Research and Development).” 3. In the Schedule to the principal regulations, the Schedule prescribing eligibility criteria and qualifications for the following post shall be substituted, namely:- “Junior Hindi Translator.” 4. In the Schedule to the principal regulations, the Schedule prescribing the eligibility criteria and qualifications for the following posts shall be inserted, namely:- “Chief General Manager (Planning and Statistics) Chief General Manager (Standardization, Research, Development and ' Quality) Hindi Officer.” 5. In the Schedule to the principal regulations, after Note 2, the following note shall be inserted, namely:- “Note—3:- Where deputation / contract is prescribed as a mode of recruitment in Column 5 of the Schedules and where the adequate response is not received against the specialized posts, if the Chairman is of the opinion that it is necessary or expedient to do so, he may for the reasons to be recorded in writing, relax the essential experience required for the post.” 6. In the Schedule to the principal regulations, against the post of Chief General Manager (Technical), in column 8, for the entry, the following entry shall be substituted:- “(1) From internal candidates holding the post of a General Manager (Tech) on a regular basis for a period of 6 years and possessing the essential educational qualifications and essential experience stipulated in column 7 an_d possessing a -- 7 of 11 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART lII——SEC. 4] minimum of three years experience as Project Director, provided that the Competent Authority may relax this condition for the next two years for those regular General Managers (Tech), working presently at Headquarters and not given field posting; provided further that such officers on promotion shall have to work compulsorily in the field for two years.” Dr. 1N. SINGH,Member(Administration) [ADVT. Ill/4/Exty./122/12] Footnote:— The principal regulations were published vide notification No.NHA‘R-12011/1/95-Admn., 4, dated the 24th January, 2013. dated 11"I March, 1996, in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part III, Section 4, dated the ll“I March, 1996 and last amended vide notification No.NHAl/1 10l l/l7/2012-HR.I(V01.IX), dated 24'11 January, 2013, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part III — Section Explanatory Memorandum Anything done or omitted to be done prior to notification of this amendment shall not be affected by promulgation of this amendment. Desirable:- (i) Knowledge at the level of Matriculation of a recognized Board or equivalent of one of the languages other than Hindi mentioned in the Eighth Schedule of the Constitution. 0R (ii) Degree or Diploma in translation from Hindi to English and vicevversa from a recognized University. Government or State Governments or Union Territories or Universities or Recognized Research Institutions or Public Sector Undertakings or Semi Govemment or Statutory or Autonomous Organizations and other Government Bodies:— (i) holding analogous post on regular basis in the pay scale of Pay Band-2 06930044800) with Grade Pay Rs.4200/— (in CDA pattem) in the parent cadre/ department; or (ii) with six years’ service in the grade rendered afier appointment thereto on a regular basis in posts in the pay scale of Pay Band-l (Rs.5200-20200) “nth Grade Pay Rs.2800/- (in CDA pattern) in the parent cadre/ department; or (iii) with ten years’ service in the grade rendered alter appointment thereto on a regular basis in posts in the pay scale of Pay Band-l (Rs.5200v20200) with Grade Pay Rs.2400/- (in CDA pattem) in the parent cadre/ department; and Possessing the essential educational qualifications and experience stipulated in column 7 0R (2) By direct recruitment I contract from candidates possessing essential educational qualifications and essential experience stipulated in column 7. Period of degutation Initial period of deputation shall be 05 years, which may be extended for a period of 02 years or curtailed with the approval of the Appointing Authority. -- 8 of 11 -- [am 11171317: 4] WWW1W Name of post No. of past Classification Pay Band and Method of recruitment of post Grade Pay 1 2 3 4 5 Chief General Manager 01 Group-A PB-4 (Rs.37400- Promotion / Deputation (Planning and Statistics) (2013), 67000) with Grade subject to variation Pay Rs l0,000 dependent on workload from a recognized University/ Institute; 01' recognized University/ Institute; or recognized University/ Institute; or Economic Service (IES). Age limit Educational qualification and experience required In case of recruitment by promotion / deputation, the (in respect of grades from which to be made direct recruitment only) 6 7 8 Not Essential Educational Qualificationz- Selection through Search—eum-Selection Committee:- Applicable (1) By promotion from amongst General Manager (Technical) of NHAI with three years’ regular service in the grade; gal possessing essential educational qualification and essential experience stipulated in Clauses (ii) and (iii) ofColumn 7‘ 0R (2) By deputation from officers under the Central Government or State Govemments or Union Territories or Universities or Recognized Research Institutions or Public Sector Undertakings or Semi Government or Statutory or Autonomous Organizations and other Government Bodiesz» (i) holding analogous post on regular basis in the pay scale of Pay Band-4 (Rs.37400-67000) with Grade Pay Rs.l0,000/» (in CDA pattem) in the parent cadre/ department; or (ii) with two years’ service in the grade rendered afier appointment thereto on regular basis in the posts in the Pay Band-4 (Rs,37400—67000) with Grade Pay Rs.8900/— (in CDA pattern) in the parent cadre/ department; or (iii) with three years’ service in the grade rendered after appointment thereto on regular basis in the posts in the Pay Band-4 (Rs.37400-67000) with Grade Pay Rs.8700/- (in CDA pattern) in the parent cadre/ department; and Possessing the essential educational qualification and essential experience stipulated in Column 7. Period of deputation Initial period of deputation shall be 05 years, which may be extended for a period of 02 years or curtailed with the approval of the Appointing Authority. Note: Where juniors who have completed their qualifying or eligibility service are being considered for promotion, their seniors would also be considered provided they are not short of the requisite qualifying or eligibility service by more than half of such qualifying or eligibility service or two years, whichever is less, and have successfully completed their probation period for promotion to the next higher grade along with their juniors who have already completed such qualifying or eligibility service. gas 61/13—3 -- 9 of 11 -- IO THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART [IF—SEC. 4] Name of post No. of post Classification Pay Band and Method of recruitment ofJgost Grade Pay 2 3 4 5 Chief General Manager 01 Group-A PB-4 (Rs.37400- Promotion / Deputation (Standardization, Research, (2013), 67000) with Development and Quality) subject to variation Grade Pay dependent on workload Rs. 10,000 Age limit Educational qualification and experience required In case of recruitment by promotion / deputation, the (in respect of grades from which to be made direct recruitment onlyL 6 7 8 Not Applicable Essential Educational Qualification:- Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering or equivalent from a recognized University/ Institute. Desirable Educational Qualification:- (a) Post Graduate Degree in Civil Engineering in a field related to Highway Engineering from a recognized University/ Institute; or (b) Post Graduate Degree / Diploma in Management from a recognized University/ Institute; or (c) Degree in Law from a recognized University/ Institute. Essential Experience:- (i) Should be working in an analogous post on a regular basis; o_r the post equivalent to that of General Manager of NHAI or; Superintending Engineer of MoRT&I—I in the Pay Band-4 with Grade Pay Rs.8700/— (in CDA pattern) for a period of at least three years on a regular basis; and (ii) At least 17 years’ service in a Group-‘A’ post carrying the pay scale ofPay Band-3 (Rs.15600-39100) with Grade Pay Rs.5400/— or higher (in CDA Pattern) on a regular basis; and (iii) Out of which at least 12 years experience in Highways/ Road/ Bridge engineering, of which minimum of 03 years experience in Standardization/ Research & Development/ Quality, Desirable Experience:- Should be well versed in the field of planning, pre- qualification of consultants and contractors; financial appraisal of projects; detailed designing; techno- frnancial reviews; evaluation of tenders; contract management; monitoring; liaison with major construction agencies / government bodies; performance appraisal of major highways/ bridge projects Selection through Search-cum-Selection Committee:- (1) By promotion from amongst General Manager (Technical) of NHAI with three years’ regular service in the grade; gn.d possessing essential educational qualification and essential experience stipulated in Clauses (ii) and (iii) ofColumn 7, OR (2) By deputation from ofiicers under the Central Government or State Governmenw or Union Territories or Universities or Recognized Research Institutions or Public Sector Undertakings or Semi Government or Statutory or Autonomous Organizations and other Government Bodies:- (i) holding analogous post on regular basis in the pay scale of Pay Band—4 (Rs,37400-67000) with Grade Pay Rs.10,000/— (in CDA pattem) in the parent cadre/ department; or (ii) with two years’ service in the grade rendered afier appointment thereto on regular basis in the posts in the Pay Band-4 (Rs.37400—67000) with Grade Pay Rs.8900/- (in CDA pattern) in the parent cadre/ department; or (iii) with three years’ service in the grade rendered alter appointment thereto on regular basis in the posts in the Pay Band-4 (Rs.37400-67000) with Grade Pay Rs.8700/— (in CDA pattern) in the parent cadre/ department; and Possessing the essential educational qualification and essential experience stipulated in Column 7, Period of deputation Initial period of deputation shall be 05 years, which may be extended for a period of 02 years or curtailed with the approval of the Appointing Authority. Note: Where juniors who have completed their qualifying or eligibility service are being considered for promotion, their seniors would also be considered provided they are not short of the requisite qualifying or eligibility service by more than half of such qualifying or eligibility service or two years, whichever is less, and have successfully completed their probation period for promotion to the next higher grade along with their juniors who have already completed such qualifying or eligibility service. -- 10 of 11 -- V [“111 III—W 4] Wfilmzmm 11 Name of Post No. of Post Classification of Post Pay Band and Grade Method of recruitment Pay 1 2 3 4 5 Hindi Officer 01 Group-A PB-3 (Rs.15600— Promotion / Deputation (2013), 39100) with Grade Pay subject to variation ofRs.5400 dependent on workload Age limit for Educational qualification and experience required In case of recruitment by promotion] deputation, the (i) Essential :- Master’s degree of a recognized University or equivalent in Hindi with English as a subject at the degree level; ' 0R Master’s degree of a recognized University or equivalent in English with Hindi as a subject at the degree level; 0R Master's degree of a recognized University or equivalent in any subject with Hindi and English as subjects at the degree level; OR Master’s degree of a recognized University or equivalent in any subject with Hindi Medium and English as a subject at the degree level; OR Master’s degree of a recognized University or equivalent in any subject with English Medium and Hindi as a subject at the degree level Desirable:- Knowledge at the level of Matriculation of a recognized Board or equivalent of one of the languages other than Hindi mentioned in the Eighth Schedule of the Constitution. 01' (ii) Degree or Diploma in translation from Hindi to English and vice-versa fiom a recognized University. Essential Experience:- Five years experience of terminological work in Hindi and translation work from English to Hindi or vice-a- versa, preferably of technical or scientific literature Translator in NHAI with six years‘ regular service in the grade. Bodies:- (i) holding analogous post on regular basis in the pay scale of Pay Band-3 (Rs,15600—39100) with Grade Pay Rs.5400/— (in CDA pattern) in the parent cadre/ department; department; department; direct grades from which to be made recruitment 6 7 8 Not Applicable Educational qualifications: (1) By promotion from amongst Junior Hindi OR (2) By deputation from officers under the Central Government or State Governments or Union Territories or Universities or Recognized Research Institutions or Public Sector Undertakings or Semi Government or Statutory or Autonomous Organizations and other Government or (ii) with three years’ service in the grade rendered alter appointment thereto on a regular basis in posts in the pay scale of Pay Band-2 (Rs.9300~34800) with Grade Pay Rs.4600/— (in CDA pattern) or (iii) with six years’ service in the grade rendered afier appointment thereto on a regular basis in posts in the pay scale of Pay Band-2 (Rs.9300-34800) with Grade Pay Rs.4200/- (in CDA pattern) in the parent cadre/ and Possessing the essential educational qualifications and essential experience stipulated in column 7 Period of deputation Initial period of deputation shall be 05 years, which may be extended for a period of 02 years or curtailed with the approval of the Appointing Authority. in the parent cadre/ Note: Where juniors who have completed their qualifying or eligibility service are being considered for promotion, their seniors would also be considered provided they are not short of the requisite qualifying or eligibility service by more than half of such qualifying or eligibility service or two years, whichever is less, and have successfully completed their probation period for promotion to the next higher grade along with their juniors who have already completed such qualifying or eligibility service.
